ChangeRequest.name: Change to the name of FRBRNC_MSR_TYP_11
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview Currently, the Domain Forbearance measure type ([FRBRNC_MSR_TYP](https://sdd.ecb.de/bycode/domain/ECB/FRBRNC_MSR_TYP)) has, among others, the following two members: - [FRBRNC_MSR_TYP_11](https://sdd.ecb.de/bybusinessid/member/FRBRNC_MSR_TYP_11) - [FRBRNC_MSR_TYP_10](https://sdd.ecb.de/bybusinessid/member/FRBRNC_MSR_TYP_10)
Both with the name "Forborne: instruments with modified interest rate below market conditions". It should be: - FRBRNC_MSR_TYP_11 "Forborne: instruments with modified interest rate **not** below market conditions" - FRBRNC_MSR_TYP_10 "Forborne: instruments with modified interest rate below market conditions"
### Contact person @Maria_Manuel.Henriques
### Description of change request change the name of FRBRNC_MSR_TYP_11 to "Forborne: instruments with modified interest rate **not** below market conditions"
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes Domain: FRBRNC_MSR_TYP Allowed Value: FRBRNC_MSR_TYP_11
### Forward Engineering considerations _[Other considerations]_
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
